display.purpose: Main page title and routing header

body.purpose: Primary labels, descriptions and standard output

label.purpose: Console logs, status text, and port fields

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Standard call-to-action button for initiating processes.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background-color: #6366f1; color: #f3f4f6; font-family: 'Nunito', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; padding: 8px 16px; border: none; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), transform 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background-color: #4f46e5; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.98); }

components.name: Danger Button
components.description: Button used for halting dev servers or closing tunnels.
components.css: .ds-btn-danger { background-color: #ef4444; color: #f3f4f6; font-family: 'Nunito', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; padding: 8px 16px; border: none; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), transform 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-danger:hover { background-color: #dc2626; } .ds-btn-danger:active { transform: scale(0.98); }

components.name: Container Card
components.description: Structural layout container with 60% opacity background and border outline.
components.html:
Project Details

This is a flat layered panel container.
components.css: .ds-card { background-color: rgba(17, 24, 39, 0.6); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); border: 1px solid #1f2937; border-radius: 12px; padding: 24px; color: #f3f4f6; font-family: 'Nunito', sans-serif; } .ds-card-title { font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; margin-top: 0; margin-bottom: 8px; } .ds-card-body { font-size: 14px; color: #9ca3af; margin: 0; }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Standard text input field for ports or paths.
components.css: .ds-input { background-color: #111827; border: 1px solid #1f2937; border-radius: 6px; color: #f3f4f6; font-family: 'Nunito', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; padding: 8px 12px; outline: none; transition: border-color 150ms; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #6366f1; }

narrative.overview: The Minimalist Hypervisor visual system is designed to convey absolute control, precision, and technical utility. Operating as a dark-first dashboard, it strips away decorative fluff (such as neon grid overlays or glowing text) to prioritize real-time telemetry, structured log outputs, and layout rhythm. The design operates with density rules, allocating maximum screen real estate to active processes, CPU/RAM monitoring, and clean log streams.
keyCharacteristics: Dark void background (#0b0f17) with solid, flat card containers (#111827).
Flat depth hierarchy relying on tonal contrast instead of fuzzy box shadows.
Maximum corner rounding capped at 12px to prevent a soft 'AI-generated' look.
Strict typography scale using the Nunito font family for high legibility.

rules.name: The Rarity Rule
rules.body: Saturated primary accents (#6366f1) must cover less than 10% of any given screen area. Their sparse use represents high intent.

rules.name: The Tint Contrast Rule
rules.body: Body text on tinted cards must always remain at #f3f4f6 to guarantee a 4.5:1 contrast ratio against #111827.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Do not use shadow blurs (box-shadow) to lift elements. Depth is built using flat contrast boundaries (#111827 on top of #0b0f17 with a #1f2937 border).

dos: Do maintain a strict 4.5:1 text-to-background contrast ratio (Ink White text #f3f4f6 on Card Slate #111827).
Do enforce a maximum card corner radius of 12px.
Do use native, raw command arrays when spawning execution binaries to avoid command injection.
Do limit primary accent usage to less than 10% of total interface area.
donts: Don't use border-left/right greater than 1px as a colored stripe on cards or alerts.
Don't use gradient text (e.g. background-clip: text with a gradient) for functional headers.
Don't combine a card border with a soft drop shadow (blur radius ≥ 16px) on the same element.
Don't use arbitrary z-index values; use the semantic scale (dropdown: 100, modal-backdrop: 200, modal: 300, toast: 400).
Don't let text overflow its containers on mobile/tablet viewports; clamp font sizes properly.
